title: Avian influenza A(H5Nx): Public health knowledge gaps and research needs - Canada.ca
content:
## Avian influenza A(H5Nx): Public health knowledge gaps and research needs
Last updated: September 5, 2025
The Public Health Agency of Canada (PHAC), in collaboration with domestic and international partners, continuously monitors for emerging or re-emerging pathogens. Using a One Health approach, PHAC identifies key public health knowledge gaps and research needs 
for avian influenza A(H5Nx).
The 2025 update is available on the Federal Open Science  Repository of Canada and outlines the most urgent scientific priorities and key  knowledge gaps aligned with the broader federal science agenda.
Access the full document: Avian  influenza A(H5Nx): Public health knowledge gaps and research needs (2025) .
For archived editions of this document,  visit the Government  of Canada’s Web Archive .
